title: fraxinus sambucina
intro: Fraxinus sambucina, also known as the dwarf ash or elder ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Oleaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Fraxinus sambucina include its ability to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions such as arthritis, gout, and skin infections, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. Fraxinus sambucina can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically used to treat various health issues.
